THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NO.11 HIGH STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURPHY, THERESA $3,292.93 PRINCIPAL, $98.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,391.43, DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS DEFENDANT HAS NOT BEEN DAMAGED AT THIS TIME. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-06-2014 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DEC-30-13 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ. NOTHING REPORTED. DEPARTMENT 525.

THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DEC-30-2013. EXHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES, CLERK WESLEY RAMIREZ. DEPT 525.
